Cluster policies or governance rules are: Cluster policies or governance rules are blocking your update. Contact your cluster administrator for help resolving this issue.
Cluster updates are irreversible. After: Cluster updates are irreversible. After an update begins, it cannot be rolled back to the previous version. Verify your cluster is ready before you proceed.

You can use GitLab integration for users: You can use GitLab integration for users authenticating with GitLab credentials.
You can use Google integration for users: You can use Google integration for users authenticating with Google credentials.
You can use the GitHub integration to co: You can use the GitHub integration to connect to either GitHub or GitHub Enterprise. For GitHub Enterprise, you must provide the hostname of your instance and can optionally provide a CA certificate bundle to use in requests to the server.
You cannot rollback a paused {{ deployTy: You cannot rollback a paused {{ deployType }}. You must resume it first.

Your cluster cannot download or validate: Your cluster cannot download or validate the update payload. Check your network connectivity and registry access.
Your cluster cannot update to {{nextMajo: Your cluster cannot update to {{nextMajorMinorVersion}}. You can continue to install patch releases in {{currentMajorMinorVersion}}.
Your cluster cannot update to the next m: Your cluster cannot update to the next minor version.
Your cluster does not have enough resour: Your cluster does not have enough resources to complete the update. Make sure you have enough disk space and memory available.
Your cluster does not meet the required: Your cluster does not meet the required conditions for updating. Check the cluster status and fix any blocking conditions before you update.
Your cluster has conditions that prevent: Your cluster has conditions that prevent updates. Check the cluster status and fix any blocking conditions before you update.
Your cluster is not ready to update. Che: Your cluster is not ready to update. Check the cluster operator status and fix any failing or degraded operators before you update.
Your cluster operators are in a degraded: Your cluster operators are in a degraded or unavailable state. Fix the operator issues before you update the cluster.
Your cluster update could not be complet: Your cluster update could not be completed. Check the cluster status for details or try the update again.
Your cluster version overrides are preve: Your cluster version overrides are preventing automatic updates. To continue, remove the overrides from your ClusterVersion object.
Your default receiver will automatically: Your default receiver will automatically receive all alerts from this cluster that are not caught by other receivers first.
Your feedback is valuable in enhancing o: Your feedback is valuable in enhancing our services. To help us improve, we seek your consent to collect anonymized telemetry data. <2>Privacy statement</2>.
Your volume settings are being updated f: Your volume settings are being updated from "{{current}}" to "{{target}}". This may take a few moments.
